title: Our response to the TanStack npm supply chain attack
summary: OpenAI 详细回应了 TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” 供应链攻击，说明了为保护系统和签名证书所采取的措施，并解释了为什么 macOS 用户必须在 2026 年 6 月 12 日前更新 OpenAI 应用。文章介绍了事件经过、受影响范围以及 OpenAI 如何加强防御以应对不断演变的软件供应链威胁。
highlights: OpenAI details its response to the TanStack “Mini Shai-Hulud” supply chain attack
outlines protections taken to secure systems and signing certificates
explains why macOS users must update OpenAI apps by June 12, 2026
how OpenAI is strengthening defenses against evolving software supply chain threats
